originalTitle: Record Club is trying to be Letterboxd for music nerds
summary: There isn't really a solid equivalent to Goodreads or Letterboxd for music lovers, but Record Club is aiming to change that. Yes, we have Rate Your Music, but its interface is crowded, and it feels more geared towards longer-form reviews than cataloging your listening habits and connecting with other fans. Record Club is clean and […]
content: There isn’t really a solid equivalent to Goodreads or Letterboxd for music lovers, but Record Club is aiming to change that. Yes, we have Rate Your Music, but its interface is crowded, and it feels more geared towards longer-form reviews than cataloging your listening habits and connecting with other fans. Record Club is clean and modern, with a streamlined interface that’s quite similar to Letterboxd. The basic features you’d expect from such a site are all there. You can rate and review records or mark them as listened to. You can also see what your friends are listening to and see what albums are trending with other users. There’s a spot on your profile to list your five favorite albums, plus five records you have in heavy rotation. You can also create custom lists (ranked or unranked) and share them — handy for tracking your top albums of the year, or putting together genre-specific crash courses. You can also add records to your queue, so you can keep track of albums you want to listen to, but haven’t gotten around to yet. (I’ll probably be making extensive use of that.) You can follow your favorite artists as well as entire record labels. That makes it easy to stay on top of new artists on labels like 4AD, AD 93, Fire Talk, and Warp. Record Club pulls all of its data from the open-source music encyclopedia MusicBrainz. If you sign up, give me a follow, and see what I’m spinning on repeat this week.
chineseTitle: Record Club 正试图成为音乐迷的 Letterboxd
chineseSummary: 对于音乐爱好者来说，目前还没有真正与 Goodreads 或 Letterboxd 相当的产品，但 Record Club 的目标是改变这一现状。是的，我们有为您的音乐评分，但它的界面很拥挤，而且感觉更适合较长的评论，而不是对您的收听习惯进行分类并与其他粉丝联系。唱片俱乐部很干净并且[...]
chineseContent: 对于音乐爱好者来说，目前还没有真正能与 Goodreads 或 Letterboxd 相媲美的工具，但 Record Club 的目标是改变这一现状。是的，我们有为您的音乐评分，但它的界面很拥挤，而且感觉更适合较长的评论，而不是对您的收听习惯进行分类并与其他粉丝联系。 Record Club 干净而现代，具有与 Letterboxd 非常相似的简化界面。您期望从这样的网站获得的基本功能都在那里。您可以对记录进行评分和查看或将其标记为已收听。您还可以查看您的朋友正在听什么，以及哪些专辑受到其他用户的欢迎。您的个人资料上有一个位置可以列出您最喜欢的五张专辑，以及您经常循环播放的五张唱片。您还可以创建自定义列表（排名或未排名）并共享它们 - 方便跟踪您的年度最佳专辑，或整理特定流派的速成课程。您还可以将记录添加到队列中，以便跟踪您想听但尚未抽出时间的专辑。 （我可能会广泛使用它。）您可以关注您最喜欢的艺术家以及整个唱片公司。这使得您可以轻松掌握 4AD、AD 93、Fire Talk 和 Warp 等厂牌的新艺术家。 Record Club 从开源音乐百科全书 MusicBrainz 中提取所有数据。如果你注册了，请关注我，看看我本周会重复哪些内容。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
